description_long: This object is a medium-sized kitchen or utility knife featuring a straight, narrow blade with a pointed tip, ideal for slicing or precision cutting. The blade appears to be made of darkened or slightly tarnished metal, suggesting frequent use or age. The handle is constructed from wood, with a slightly contoured ergonomic shape and two visible metal rivets securing it to the tang. The wood handle has a natural brown finish, showing some grain and wear, and ends in a rounded pommel for a secure grip. There is no visible guard between the blade and handle, giving it a streamlined appearance. The overall design is utilitarian, with no decorative ornamentation or embellishments.
description: A medium-sized, straight-bladed knife with a dark metal blade and a contoured wooden handle secured by rivets. The design is simple and functional, with no guard or ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight blade and the wooden handle with two rivets.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the handle's profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blade and handle, similar to view 0 but from the reverse side.
description_view_3: End-on view showing the rounded pommel of the handle and the handle's width.
attribute_handle_design: contoured wooden handle with two metal rivets and a rounded pommel
